channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)

item.title: Biosensor-Based Detection of Calprotectin and Lactoferrin as Neutrophil-Derived Markers of Inflammatory Bowel Diseases: From Molecular Pathophysiology to Point-of-Care Platforms.
item.description: International journal of molecular sciences - Review - Inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD) are chronic, relapsing, immune-mediated disorders that require regular and preferably noninvasive monitoring of inflammatory activity. Fecal biomarkers of neutroph...
